com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service

Interface SoftApService.SoftApJoiningStatusCallback

  • Enclosing class:
    SoftApService

    public static interface SoftApService.SoftApJoiningStatusCallback

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onDroppedSoftApNetwork()
      Will be called if the tablet/phone drops off the softAP network.
      void onJoiningProcess()
      Will be called while the device is in the process of joining the private network.
      void onNetworkJoined()
      Will be called when the device has joined the private network.
      void onNetworkJoiningFailed()
      Will be called if the device fails to join the private network.
